case_title: KLEINSTEIN, NATHAN VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $676.00 FILED BY KLEINSTEIN, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO CCSF-AT CITY HALL RETURNED OPENED WITH"DOES NOT BELONG TO THE TAX COLLECTOR" WRITTEN ON POST-IT.
